name: uderia-teams
description: Microsoft Teams integration. Provides list_teams, list_channels, get_messages, send_message, and create_meeting tools. Requires user Microsoft account connection.

tool_schemas.name: list_teams
tool_schemas.description: List Microsoft Teams the user is a member of.

arguments.name: max_results
arguments.description: Maximum number of teams to return (default: 20, max: 50).

tool_schemas.name: list_channels
tool_schemas.description: List channels in a Microsoft Teams team.

tool_schemas.name: get_messages
tool_schemas.description: Get recent messages from a Microsoft Teams channel.

tool_schemas.name: send_message
tool_schemas.description: Post a text message to a Microsoft Teams channel.

tool_schemas.name: create_meeting
tool_schemas.description: Create a Microsoft Teams online meeting and get the join link.

arguments.name: start_datetime
arguments.description: Start time in ISO 8601 format, e.g. 2026-05-15T10:00:00+02:00.

arguments.name: attendees
arguments.description: List of attendee email addresses / UPNs (optional).

AZURE_CLIENT_ID.label: Azure App (Client) ID
AZURE_CLIENT_ID.description: Application (client) ID from your Azure App Registration (Azure Portal → App registrations → your app → Overview).

AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET.label: Azure Client Secret
AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET.description: Client secret from Azure Portal → App registrations → your app → Certificates & secrets.

AZURE_TENANT_ID.label: Azure Tenant ID (optional)
AZURE_TENANT_ID.description: Azure AD tenant ID to restrict to a single organisation. Leave empty to allow any Microsoft account (personal + work).

auth_schema.description: Connect your Microsoft account to enable Teams tools.
